puzzle.title: The Unyielding Authority
puzzle.intro: Across ancient lands, a powerful authority once held sway, commanding immense resources and the lives of countless individuals. Despite clear signs and warnings, this ruler chose a path of defiance, leading to a profound confrontation that would echo through time.
clues: I claimed ultimate power and authority over a vast domain.
I challenged a humble messenger sent by the Lord of all realms.
My people were known for their mastery of grand structures and the river that sustained our civilization.
I was witness to many miraculous signs, including a staff turning into a serpent and a hand glowing bright.
I refused to let a group of enslaved people leave my land, despite divine commands.
My pursuit of the departing people led me and my armies into the heart of a divided sea.

trial.label: Key Confrontation
options: The flood that engulfed the land
The destruction by a mighty wind

location.label: Defining Aspect
options: A staff and a glowing hand
location.answer: A staff and a glowing hand

puzzle.arabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ فَأَغْرَقْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ بِأَنَّهُمْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا غَـٰفِلِينَ
puzzle.verse: So We took retribution from them, and We drowned them in the sea because they denied Our signs and were heedless of them. (7:136)
